name: Members Plus
description_short: Members Plus Credit Union is a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution serving five Massachusetts counties with personal loans, mortgages, checking, savings, and credit cards.
description_long:
Members Plus Credit Union (MPCU) is a federally insured credit union operating in Massachusetts, serving members in Essex, Middlesex, Plymouth, Suffolk, and Norfolk counties. The institution has announced a merger with Metro Credit Union, positioning itself as a mission-driven, community-focused alternative to traditional banks. As a credit union, MPCU operates on a not-for-profit, member-owned structure regulated by the NCUA (National Credit Union Administration).

Members Plus offers a comprehensive suite of consumer financial products including personal checking and savings accounts with no minimum balances or monthly fees, consumer loans starting at 9.99% APR, new auto loans from 4.95% APR, mortgages and home equity lines of credit at 6.75% APR, and the MPCU Rewards Credit Card with a 4.90% introductory APR. The credit union also provides specialized financing such as the Mass Save HEAT Loan (0% APR for qualifying borrowers) and auto refinancing options. Online and mobile banking, along with 24/7 ATM access through the CO-OP network (thousands of ATMs nationally), provide modern convenience alongside in-person service at seven branch locations.

Members Plus distinguishes itself through several membership benefits: membership eligibility expanded to anyone living or working in their five-county service area (not employment-based), no-fee access to thousands of shared branching locations and ATMs, competitive rates on savings accounts (3.50% APY on their High-Five Money Market), and a focus on personal service combined with digital convenience. The institution actively educates members about fraud prevention and maintains a blog with financial planning resources. Their upcoming merger with Metro Credit Union signals institutional strength and commitment to expanding community reach.

A practical limitation is geographic restriction to Massachusetts residents or workers in specified counties, making this institution unavailable to consumers outside the Northeast. The website does not display full rate disclosure details for all products, and qualification rates (especially the advertised promotional rates) may require strong credit profiles. However, as a credit union rather than a commercial bank, MPCU's structure inherently prioritizes member benefit over shareholder profit, making it a legitimate not-for-profit alternative to traditional banking.
services: Savings accounts and High-Five Money Market accounts (3.50% APY)
New auto loans (4.95% APR starting rate, up to 4-year terms)
Used auto loans and auto refinancing
Home equity lines of credit (6.75% APR)
MPCU Rewards Credit Card (4.90% intro APR, cash back)
Mass Save HEAT Loan (0% APR for qualifying energy efficiency improvements)
CO-OP shared branch and ATM access (thousands nationwide)
pros: No-minimum, no-fee checking and savings accounts with no monthly maintenance charges
Competitive rates: 3.50% APY Money Market account, new auto loans from 4.95% APR, 0% APR HEAT Loan program
Expanded membership eligibility to all residents or workers in five Massachusetts counties (not employer-restricted)
Access to CO-OP network of thousands of shared branch locations and ATMs nationwide at no cost
MPCU Rewards Credit Card with 4.90% introductory APR and cash back rewards
Seven physical branch locations plus full online and mobile banking
Active fraud prevention education and member security resources
Merger with Metro Credit Union indicates institutional stability and growth
cons: Geographic limitation: membership restricted to residents or workers in Essex, Middlesex, Plymouth, Suffolk, or Norfolk counties in Massachusetts only
Advertised promotional rates (4.95% auto, 9.99% consumer loans) are starting rates requiring strong credit; actual rates may be significantly higher
Limited branch network (7 locations) compared to national banks; reliance on shared branching for broader access
Merger with Metro Credit Union in progress may create service disruptions or changes to account terms during transition
best_for: Massachusetts residents and workers in the five-county service area seeking no-fee checking and savings
Auto buyers and refinancers with good credit looking for rates below 5% APR
Homeowners seeking mortgages or home equity credit with personal service and competitive rates
Members prioritizing community-focused banking and member-owned institutions over for-profit banks
diagnosis: Members Plus Credit Union is ideal for Massachusetts residents in its five-county service area seeking a community-minded, member-owned alternative to traditional banks with competitive loan rates and no-fee accounts. The primary caveat is strict geographic limitation to specific Massachusetts counties and promotional rates that require strong credit qualification; actual rates for individual applicants may be substantially higher than advertised.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
